verdict: An exceptionally synchronized chart with great stream flow, severely held back by physically unplayable hold-tap configurations.

issues.problem: Holding U while tapping D -> R -> L in rapid 16th notes is physically unplayable for a single free foot at 173 BPM.
Holding D while tapping L -> R in 16th notes requires an extremely awkward, rapid one-foot transition.
Holding U while tapping L -> R in 16th notes forces an impossible one-foot double tap across opposite panels.
Holding R while tapping U -> D in 16th notes creates a severe physical bottleneck for the free foot.
The U -> D -> R sixteenth-note run forces an awkward double-step or a highly jarring spin transition.
